name: construction contractors processing 5–15 subcontractor compliance reports/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 subcontractor compliance reports/month, compliance tracking issues cause potential penalties. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.

problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking subcontractor compliance status leading to potential penalties.
features: manual data entry for subcontractor information
